headline: Here's Why You Should Add NI Stock to Your Portfolio Right Now

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on Consolidated Edison, Raises Price Target to $117
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Nicholas Amicucci   maintains Consolidated Edison (NYSE:ED) with a In-Line and raises the price target from $106 to $117.
